---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
# description: "A concise curriculum vitae for Lukas A. Grahl."
---

<div class="cv-intro">
  <!-- <p>This page provides a concise overview. It is intentionally kept simple so that it can be maintained directly in this file.</p> -->
</div>
 
<!-- To add a PDF download button, place your current CV at files/cv.pdf and uncomment the next line. -->
[Download full CV](files/cv.pdf){.button .button-primary}
 

## Education

<div class="cv-row">
  <div class="cv-date">2024–2027</div>
  <div>
<strong>PhD in Finance and Economics</strong><br>
    Department of Economics and Business Economics, Aarhus University
  </div>
</div>

<!-- 
<div class="cv-row">
  <div class="cv-date">2023–2024</div>
  <div>
<strong>MSc in Financial Economics</strong><br>
    Université Paris 1 Panthéon-Sorbonne, Paris
  </div>
</div>
 -->

<div class="cv-row">
  <div class="cv-date">2022–2024</div>
  <div>
<strong>MSc in Economics</strong><br>
    Université Paris 1 Panthéon-Sorbonne, Paris
    <!-- - MSc Economics (M1) -->
    <!-- - MRes Financial Economics (M2) -->
  </div>
</div>

<div class="cv-row">
  <div class="cv-date">2018–2022</div>
  <div>
<strong>BSc in Business Administration</strong><br>
    ESB Business School and Lancaster University
  </div>
</div>

## Research experience

<div class="cv-row">
  <div class="cv-date">2024</div>
  <div>
<strong>External Consultant</strong><br>
    Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD), Paris
  </div>
</div>

<div class="cv-row">
  <div class="cv-date">2023</div>
  <div>
<strong>Research Intern</strong><br>
    Deutsche Bundesbank, Frankfurt am Main
  </div>
</div>


<!-- 
## Awards

<div class="cv-row">
  <div class="cv-date">2019–</div>
  <div>
    <strong>Full Scholarship</strong><br>
    Studienstiftung des deutschen Volkes
  </div>
</div> 
-->

<!-- 
## Skills and languages

**Methods and software:** Python, Stata, R, SQL, numerical optimisation, panel econometrics, and structural estimation.  
**Languages:** German (native), English (C2), French (C1).
 -->

<!-- ## Contact -->

<!-- [Email](mailto:lukas.grahl@amkat.de) · [GitHub](https://github.com/lukasgrahl) · [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/lukasgrahl) -->
